problem id: 8f6d4fb3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10010011 -> 10011010
  11011101 -> 11101011
  11100111 -> 00111011
  10110010 -> 10010010
  01111010 -> 11010001
  10010110 -> 10110010
  11101101 -> 01101011
  01101111 -> 01111001

query: 11000101
predicted answer: 00101011
